_comment: Phrases that, if heard in the first 15 seconds of a call, classify it as spam. If ANY override_keyword from service/address/emergency is ALSO present, spam filter is bypassed. Audit logs/rejected_calls.jsonl weekly.
_comment_override: Override keywords must be SPECIFIC — generic scheduling words like 'quote' / 'estimate' were removed because spam scripts also use them ('solar quote', 'free estimate'). Stick to concrete service-need words + address markers + emergency signals.
